name: Farm Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the meat: Dredge the Beef Round in the flour seasoned with salt and pepper. Brown it slowly on all sides in shortening with garlic cloves in a heavy kettle.
2. Cook the vegetables: Add onions, carrots, and the remaining ingredients (stewed tomatoes, water, flour, and cold water) to the pot. Return the meat, stirring occasionally until tender, about 3-1/2 hours.
3. Adjust consistency: After cooking, remove the meat, strain the vegetables, and measure the broth in the pot. Add enough meat stock or water to make 2 cups. Blend with flour and cold water, then cook until thickened.
